name: claude-harness-engineering
description: Harness-engineering skills for Claude Code: scaffold the tuning stack into a new project, or retrofit it into an existing codebase.

plugins.name: claude-stack
plugins.description: Engineer the Claude Code harness for a repo. Bundles three skills: bootstrap-claude-stack (scaffold a new project), adopt-claude-stack (retrofit an existing repo), and production-readiness-assessor (audit readiness across 13 dimensions).
